# InterviewPilot AI
> AI-powered voice interview platform that simulates realistic technical and behavioral interviews through dynamic conversations.

## What is InterviewPilot AI?
InterviewPilot AI enables candidates to practice interviews with an AI interviewer through natural voice conversations. Unlike traditional mock interview platforms that rely on static question banks, InterviewPilot generates contextual follow-up questions, adapts to candidate responses, and provides personalized feedback after each session.

## Key Features
- Real-time voice interviews powered by AI
- Adaptive follow-up questions based on responses
- Detailed feedback reports with scores and improvement suggestions
- Multiple interview types: Behavioral, Technical, System Design, Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack, DevOps
- Dark/light theme support
- PostgreSQL persistence with Prisma ORM
- Redis caching layer
- JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Next.js Route Handlers, Zod validation
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (Supabase) with Prisma ORM
- **Cache**: Redis with in-memory fallback
- **AI**: OpenAI Realtime API + ElevenLabs Conversational AI
- **Auth**: JWT (jose) + bcrypt + CSRF protection
- **Deployment**: Vercel

## Architecture
- Layered architecture: Route Handlers → Services → Repositories → Prisma → PostgreSQL
- Feature-first organization with shared UI component library
- AI Provider abstraction supporting OpenAI + ElevenLabs with fallback
- Conversation Engine with 8-state machine and deterministic follow-up decisions
- Modular prompt engine with versioned, composable prompt blocks
- Repository pattern with Redis cache-aside caching

## Documentation
- Full product documentation: docs/product/
- Engineering documentation: docs/engineering/
- Architecture Decision Records: docs/decisions/
- Operational runbooks: docs/runbooks/
- Document templates: docs/templates/

## Getting Started
```bash
git clone https://github.com/niranjansah87/interviewpilot-ai.git
cd interviewpilot-ai
pnpm install
cp .env.example .env.local
# Fill in DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.
pnpm dev
```

## Environment Variables
- DATABASE_URL — Supabase PostgreSQL connection
- JWT_SECRET — Access token signing (min 32 chars)
- JWT_REFRESH_SECRET — Refresh token signing (min 32 chars)
- OPENAI_API_KEY — OpenAI API key
- OPENAI_REALTIME_MODEL — Realtime model identifier
- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY — ElevenLabs API key
- ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID — ConvAI agent ID
- REDIS_URL — Redis connection (optional, falls back to memory)
- VOICE_PROVIDER — elevenlabs | openai | mock
- NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL — Application URL
